bias_notes: A spacious, flat regional track located on the NSW/VIC border. It features a generous 400m home straight, making it a premium and very fair galloping surface.

handicapping_angles.track_bias: Extremely fair. The long straight gives backmarkers plenty of time and room to wind up and swoop.
handicapping_angles.barrier_draw: Generally fair across most distances due to the wide track.
handicapping_angles.border_form: Always cross-reference Victorian country form against local NSW form.
